hyperedges.label: Agent envelope v1 emit + timed-out warning flow
Voice Memos SQLite DB (Python + Swift impls)
AIProvider stub conformances used to drive LLM-backed extraction/planning tests
JXA script-builder soft-timeout pattern (start timestamp, early-break, timedOut meta) tested across Mail and Notes bridges

Pagination/Cursor helpers exercised directly and via NotesCommand list flags
Voice memo capture to reminders flow
DoCommand plan-and-execute over MCP tool registry
Mail semantic search index + store + embeddings
Mail bridge cross-account timeout scaling subsystem
Layered timeout strategy (soft JXA cap, ScriptRunner cap, MCP hard cap)
Mail CLI evolution (plan, subcommands, AI bridge)
